title: Trump’s Threat to Impose Fees in the Strait of Hormuz Contradicts His Aides
summary_full: President Trump said the United States could collect tolls or fees, despite Vice President JD Vance and Secretary of State Marco Rubio saying no country could do so.
summary_public: President Trump said the United States could collect tolls or fees, despite Vice President JD Vance and Secretary of State Marco Rubio saying no country could do so.
